creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the instance template was created

effective_labels.description: Resolved labels applied to the instance template for organization and filtering

id.description: Unique identifier for the instance template resource

metadata_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint used to detect metadata changes on the instance template

self_link.description: Fully qualified URL to access the instance template

tags_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint used to detect tag changes on the instance template

terraform_labels.description: Labels assigned via Terraform for resource management and identification
